          toFun := fun i => if i ∈ {a₁ * x} then b₁ * r else 0, mem_support_toFun := ⋯ })
      z =
    f y * r

inst✝¹ : LinearOrder I
inst✝ : IsWellOrder I fun x x_1 => x < x_1
C : Set (I → Bool)
o : Ordinal.{u}
hC : IsClosed C
hsC : contained C (Order.succ o)
ho : o < Ordinal.type fun x x_1 => x < x_1
x₁ : ↑C → ℤ
hx₁ : IsLocallyConstant x₁
hx₂ :
  (ShortComplex.mk (ModuleCat.ofHom (πs C o)) (ModuleCat.ofHom (Linear_CC' C hsC ho)) ⋯).g
      { toFun := x₁, isLocallyConstant := hx₁ } =
    0
⊢ ∃ x₁_1,
    (ShortComplex.mk (ModuleCat.ofHom (πs C o)) (ModuleCat.ofHom (Linear_CC' C hsC ho)) ⋯).f x₁_1 =
      { toFun := x₁, isLocallyConstant := hx₁ }

I : Type u
inst✝¹ : LinearOrder I
inst✝ : IsWellOrder I fun x x_1 => x < x_1
C : Set (I → Bool)
o : Ordinal.{u}
hC : IsClosed C
hsC : contained C (Order.succ o)
ho : o < Ordinal.type fun x x_1 => x < x_1
x₂ : ↑(ShortComplex.mk (ModuleCat.ofHom (πs C o)) (ModuleCat.ofHom (Linear_CC' C hsC ho)) ⋯).X₂
hx₂ : (Linear_CC' C hsC ho) x₂ = 0
⊢ ∃ x₁, (ShortComplex.mk (ModuleCat.ofHom (πs C o)) (ModuleCat.ofHom (Linear_CC' C hsC ho)) ⋯).f x₁ = x₂
